description: Create a content slide on travelers' gen AI use across the travel experience with a two-column layout: a left bullet list of research percentages by category and a right horizontal multi-series bar chart showing recommendation follow-through across 2024, 2025, and 2026.

header.headline: Travelers use gen AI to gather information across aspects of the travel experience, and follow-through grows in some categories but contracts in others
header.sub: The most popular categories for gen AI research are complex, destination-dependent decisions—activities, attractions, and accommodations. Over the past year, follow-through on activity and attraction recommendations leapfrogged from a laggard to a leader.

left.title: Percentage researching with gen AI (among travelers using it)

right.title: Gen AI use cases and conversion to action — Visited or booked based on a gen AI tool’s travel recommendations
